name: Auth0 Accounts Never Used (90 days)
description: Detects active Auth0 accounts older than 90 days that have never logged in.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.created_at AS created_at FROM auth0_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.blocked, false) = false AND u.last_login IS NULL AND u.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
remediation: Remove or disable never-used accounts and fix any over-provisioning in onboarding workflows.
